subcodes.first_line: O thou who speaketh in remembrance of God! Know thou that the hearts of these yearning ones are, at all times, stirred by the fragrances of His remembrance and reflection [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بذکر الله همچو بدان که قلوب این مشتاقان در کل احیان بنفحات ذکر و فکر
